externalConsequence.target: replace with exact paused operation and downstream resource

environment.target: replace with exact paused operation and downstream resource

journeyResults.oracle: Replace with Executor and downstream readback oracle.

commandReceipt.invariant: Ambiguous, replayed, or non-owner approval must fail closed.
commandReceipt.recoveryHint: Attach unambiguous approval, expiry, rollback, and both readbacks.
commandReceipt.postcondition: No mutation occurs by this template.

externalReadback.receipt: replace with Executor and downstream readbacks

postconditions: No operation resumes while readback is unavailable.
limitations: Executor output alone cannot prove a downstream consequence.
nonClaims: This template does not resume work, mutate a resource, or establish approval.
